testsuite.name: exposed.InterfaceTest

testcase.name: Flower.water() should increase health by 10, capped at 100
Flower.grow() should increase height by 2.5 per call
Succulent should not grow beyond maxHeight
Flower should not grow beyond maxHeight
Flower.isFullyGrown() should return true when height >= maxHeight
Herb.getPrice() should return the price passed to constructor
Succulent.grow() should increase height by 0.5 per call
Herb.grow() should increase height by 1.8 per call
PlantShop should correctly categorize plants by interface
Herb.water() should increase health by 15, starting from 60

testsuite.system-out: [Plant] Static initializer block [Flower] Static initializer block [Plant] Instance initializer block [Plant] Constructor called for: Rose [Flower] Instance initializer block
